passives.name: Dream Maker
passives.effects: Every 8 seconds, you gain a ''Blue Dream Bubble'' and a ''Purple Dream Bubble''. Granting a {{tip|heal}} or {{tip|shield}} to an allied champion ''(excluding yourself)'' causes you to grant both of your ''Dream Bubbles'' to them, empowering them for 3 seconds. The ''Blue Bubble'' reduces the next instance of non-{{tip|minion}} damage they take by {{pp|75 to 255 for 13|1;7 to 18|type=your level}} and the ''Purple Bubble'' grants them {{as|{{pp|50 to 170 for 13|1;7 to 18|type=your level}} '''bonus''' magic damage}} [[on-hit]] on their next basic attack.
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

active.name: Ward
active.effects: Consumes a charge to place a {{tip|Stealth Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area. Charges refill upon visiting the shop.

effects_structured.raw: Every 8 seconds, you gain a ''Blue Dream Bubble'' and a ''Purple Dream Bubble''
Granting a {{tip heal}} or {{tip shield}} to an allied champion ''(excluding yourself)'' causes you to grant both of your ''Dream Bubbles'' to them, empowering them for 3 seconds

The ''Blue Bubble'' reduces the next instance of non-{{tip minion}} damage they take by {{pp 75 to 255 for 13 1;7 to 18 type=your level}} and the ''Purple Bubble'' grants them {{as {{pp 50 to 170 for 13 1;7 to 18 type=your level}} '''bonus''' magic damage}} [[on-hit]] on their next basic attack.
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

modifiers.post_5_minutes_gold_reduction_formula_no: 50% + 1% per minion kill starting from 20 kills, capped at 50 kills

effects_structured.raw: Purple Bubble grants bonus magic damage on next basic attack.
Consumes a charge to place a {{tip Stealth Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip sight}} of the surrounding area.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Dream Maker is modeled as an enchanter transfer item that periodically prepares paired defensive/offensive bubbles for the next ally heal or shield event.
Ward charges refill upon visiting the shop; charge count and ward duration are not encoded here.

Support-income diminishing minion-gold behavior now encodes page-verified threshold formulas and reduction ranges (pre-5-minutes and post-5-minutes), while exact per-minute windowing and team support-item dynamics remain shared-rule dependencies.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
